article_meta.title: Item 1 of 7 Texas State Troopers line up during a protest at the South Texas Family Residential Center, where Adrian Con

reasoning: No attribution violations and two defensible bias flags, but one questionable flag and several clear author-level loaded phrases were missed; one label is debatable.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged text comes from the author’s prose/summaries, not from quotes or attributed statements.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: “None had criminal records.” as Slant is debatable; the other two items are defensible author-level bias.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed multiple clear author-prose phrases like “mass-deportation campaign,” “SOARING NUMBER OF IMMIGRANT DETAINEES,” “drive to lock up more immigrants,” “LANDSLIDE OF LAWSUITS,” and “legal logjam.”
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: “Negativity Bias” for the first item is arguable but could fit better as Word Choice/Spin; “Sensationalism” for the second is apt; “Slant” for the third is likely misapplied (closer to omission-of-context, if anything).
